metadata.reference: A. Ciesielski, L. Skowronski, M. Trzinski, T. Szoplik. Controlling the optical parameters of self-assembled silver films with wetting layers and annealing. Appl. Surf. Sci. 421B, 349-356 (2017) (Numerical data kindly provided by Arkadiusz Ciesielski)
metadata.comments: 20 nm-thick silver film deposited on SiO<sub>2</sub> substrate with 2 nm-thick Ni wetting interlayer
